commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh The king's daughter is all glorious within the palace: her clothing is of woven gold. Roman Septuagint, have "of Hesebon "by mistake, for Esothen. (Calmet) Queens in the East, could not appear much abroad. (Kimchi) When they go out, they cannot be seen. The beauty of the Church consists in virtue, and in the grace of God. (Calmet) Borders. Charity influences the exterior works of piety, (Tirinus) and gives beauty to the ceremonies (St. Basil) and decorations used by the Church, with such magnificence.
